item.title: Aston Martin to cut up to 20% of its workforce
item.description: Aston Martin announced a plan to cut up to 20% of its workforce as ongoing financial struggles and challenging market conditions affecting the luxury ...

item.title: Jamie Dimon warns of pre-financial crisis parallels, says some people doing ‘dumb things’
item.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon warned that current market conditions mirror 2008 financial crisis buildup, citing high asset prices and risky lending practi...

item.title: Dog treats recalled over fears of salmonella contamination, FDA says
item.description: The FDA announced a recall of Elite Treats Chicken Chips for Dogs due to potential salmonella contamination. No illnesses have been reported yet.

item.title: Consumer confidence rebounds in February as Americans grow less pessimistic about jobs
item.description: February consumer confidence improved but stayed below 2024 peaks as households continue weighing job market prospects against persistent cost worries...

item.title: Self-defense company finds major benefits after moving manufacturing from overseas to US
item.description: Byrna Technologies CEO Bryan Ganz moved manufacturing from South Africa to Indiana before President Donald Trump's tariffs, saying the company "correc...
